title: Grudge Studio Best Practices
principles: One SSOT per concern: ObjectStore definitions, R2 binaries, Railway player state
Same-origin /api for first-party apps; Railway+ID for Puter/foreign hosts
Bearer JWT; fleet token keys only
Never mix account inventory with character PATCH
No Meshy/capsule stand-ins for grudge6 races
Validate visually and with stub/size gates before claiming fixed
Tag every upload with era (warlords|nexus|armada) + dim/style; follow era-asset-taxonomy.json paths
Never mix open-world 9 sector ids with home-block 3x3 slots

eras.warlords: fantasy/medieval — grudge6, home island, 9 sectors, nature
eras.shared2d: icons, sprites, UI, fonts, VFX sheets — tag eras[] when specific

upload: Convert production-ready → recognize era → correct R2 prefix → catalog + D1 → probe CDN

converting.summary: Blender FBX import → modular glTF library; preserve Bip001; no join/flatten; re-verify UV vs FBX
rules: FBX is visual SSOT until GLB matches screenshots
Rebind race atlas; invert UV V on Blender GLB if scrambled

rendering.summary: Three.js loaders, SkeletonUtils.clone, sRGB, material clone per instance
rules: FBXLoader for browse truth; GLTFLoader for kit GLB deploy path
Ground characters with bbox feet offset

textures.summary: Race atlas WebP, sRGB, flipY=false for grudge6 rebind, ClampToEdge

meshMaterials.summary: Child-mesh equip; MeshStandard low metalness; fuzzy mesh_id match

terrain.summary: Home island contract 1024m; organized nature; map-registry families
rules: Warlords era open world != home 3x3 blocks

npcs.summary: Same race kits + equip; clone skinned; regulator AI Hz

vendors.summary: Stock from ObjectStore defs; mutations on Railway; ICON for items
rules: No hard-coded item tables on Puter

allies.summary: Shared clips; material-clone tints; server-auth damage when multiplayer

climbing.summary: Kinematic capsule + surface tags walk/climb; separate climb SM from combat

combat.summary: 8-attr pipeline; freeform ARPG equipment; soft/hard target; arsenal VFX

harvesting.summary: Biome/island nodes; tool mesh + profession; yield to account/stockpile; server deplete

building.summary: 1m snap Kenney prototype; blueprint then commit; Railway island persistence

antiPatterns.good: real kit FBX/GLB from convert pipeline
